basics.name: Ryan Taylor
basics.label: Platform & Infrastructure Engineer
basics.summary: Platform & Infrastructure Engineer with 3+ years at Raytheon building automated, reproducible systems for large-scale aerospace programs. Active DoD Secret clearance.

work.name: Raytheon Intelligence & Space
highlights: Architected OS-level configuration and build systems for a custom embedded Linux platform, enabling reproducible and version-controlled system images
Shipped internal automation tooling to standardize and accelerate developer environment setup, cutting manual configuration overhead and onboarding time

work.name: Raytheon Intelligence & Space
work.position: Systems Infrastructure Engineer — James Webb Space Telescope
highlights: Automated full VM lifecycle management across multiple environments by introducing Terraform infrastructure-as-code workflows
Developed Ansible-based configuration pipelines enabling consistent, repeatable environment provisioning from a single execution
Wired provisioning and configuration workflows into GitLab CI/CD, enabling fully automated environment deployment on merge

work.name: Raytheon Intelligence & Space
highlights: Owned large-scale, multi-instance Atlassian environments (Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket) across deployments, upgrades, and migrations
Built custom Jira workflows to enforce Agile processes and eliminate manual tracking overhead
Stood up and maintained IBM ELM environments (DNG, RQM, GC) with DB2 backends supporting program-wide requirements and test management
Automated administrative workflows using Python and platform APIs, reducing repetitive operational tasks and improving system efficiency
Maintained production RHEL systems covering user management, patching, backups, and incident troubleshooting

work.name: Staples
highlights: Managed all operations for a 6-person department averaging $250K/year in revenue
Grew department sales by 60% over 12 months; maintained a 95% customer satisfaction rating

projects.name: WhatAmI.cooking
projects.description: Full-stack meal planning app with OAuth via AWS Cognito, DynamoDB persistence, weekly meal planner, auto-generated shopping lists, and a URL importer that scrapes recipes from any site. Deployed via GitHub Actions to AWS Elastic Beanstalk.

projects.name: Deckbuilder
projects.description: Full-featured Magic: The Gathering and Star Wars: Unlimited deck builder pulling live card data from Scryfall, card suggestions from EDHREC, and tournament results from EDHTop16 and MTGTop8.

projects.name: VimMail
projects.description: Keyboard-driven Gmail client inspired by Vim's modal editing. A companion Flutter app brings the same visual styling and quick mail triaging to mobile.

projects.name: Calorie Tracker
projects.description: Mobile-first calorie tracking app with plain-text food logging and AI-powered parsing via GPT-4o mini.
